blocking_constraints.title: Unit tests did NOT catch any of the three Phase 18 regressions
blocking_constraints.description: 1738 tests were green when 18-01/02/03 merged. All three plans had blocker-level UAT failures in production: vim Esc/Insert-mode broken, chevron switch to python3/c blanks the Code section, relative line numbers toggle is a no-op. Live DOM probes via DevTools are the only reliable verification path for Phase 18 work. The resuming agent MUST add live diagnostic instrumentation BEFORE writing any fix code and MUST verify the fix in the user's vault before claiming completion.

blocking_constraints.title: Existing 18-01/02/03 PLAN.md files have shape mismatches with reality
blocking_constraints.description: Plan 18-02 said the slug-mismatch invalidation callsite was at src/main.ts:920 (metadataCache handler) but the actual disagreement was at src/main.ts:2751 (checkStaleChildAndInvalidate) reading raw fence opener via readActiveFenceSlug at line 2826. Plan 18-03 added a 7th param to createChildEditor but the integration through nestedEditorExtension.ts:NestedEditorWidget.toDOM didn't actually pass it. The resuming agent MUST re-plan all three sub-plans from scratch — do NOT iterate on the existing PLAN.md files.

blocking_constraints.title: checkStaleChildAndInvalidate normalization fix was insufficient
blocking_constraints.description: When 18-02 was deployed and the chevron-blank-on-python3-c bug surfaced, a hotfix was attempted to normalize readActiveFenceSlug via resolveLangSlug from src/solve/languages.ts (alias-resolves python→python3, cpp→c). The user reported 'still broken' AFTER the normalization landed. Either the fix wasn't covering all paths OR the bug has a second causal route (possibly the vault.on('modify') listener firing during switchFenceLanguage's mid-flight state). The resuming agent MUST NOT assume a simple normalization fix is sufficient — capture live DevTools probe data showing the actual chevron-switch state machine.

blocking_constraints.title: Vault has Obsidian's plugin-folder shadow caching gotcha
blocking_constraints.description: User's vault has the plugin installed at ~/Documents/Obsidian Vault/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-leetcode/ (NOT plugins/leetcode/). A previous shadow folder caused hours of debugging in Phase 17 UAT. memory/vault_plugin_path.md captures this. Always deploy to the active dir; verify with app.plugins.manifests.leetcode.dir.

decisions.title: Phase 18 stays in v1.2 scope
decisions.rationale: User confirmed 2026-05-25 — all three Phase 18 plans must ship before v1.2 release. Cannot defer to v1.3.

decisions.title: All three Phase 18 merges reverted
decisions.rationale: Live UAT showed blocker-level regressions in all three plans (commits 60c5cdf, eabec6a, ac54eb3). Reverted in dc886a1 / cf7cd51 / 98dec9b. Tree at HEAD 692ed26 = Phase 17 round-3 baseline + the regression debug doc.

decisions.title: Re-plan from scratch, don't iterate existing PLAN.md
decisions.rationale: The existing 18-01/02/03 PLAN.md files contain wrong assumptions about the codebase (callsite line numbers, integration paths). A resuming agent reading them will reproduce the same blind spots. Burn them; replan from the failure-mode descriptions in .planning/debug/phase-18-regressions-2026-05-25.md.

next_steps: Resume by reading .planning/debug/phase-18-regressions-2026-05-25.md — captures all three failure modes with confirmed root causes and redesign fix paths.
Spawn /gsd-debug for the chevron-blank-on-python3-c regression FIRST (most damaging — affects core feature for two languages).
Add live diagnostic probes BEFORE coding any fix. Have user run DevTools snippets and paste results. Don't trust unit tests to catch these UI/lifecycle bugs.
Re-plan 18-01 (vim Scope), 18-02 (recovery + invalidation), 18-03 (relative line numbers) from scratch in fresh PLAN.md files.
After all three pass live UAT, run Plan 18-04 (manual ship-readiness pass: bundle audit, heap snapshot, regression spot-checks).
